Autonomous AI
That Thinks With You

Heady™ Systems builds AI agents that embed into your real workflow — your IDE, your browser, your terminal. Not another chatbot. A thinking partner that learns, adapts, and ships alongside you.

Products

Everything You Need.
Nothing You Don't.

Six production-ready products that cover your entire development lifecycle.

💜

HeadyBuddy

Your personal AI companion. Lives in your browser, learns your patterns, helps you create. Cross-device voice dictation, intelligent search, and a soul that remembers.

Explore HeadyBuddy →
🖥️

HeadyOS

The AI Operating System. Fleet management, network tunnels, security panels, and billing — all orchestrated through a command center you actually want to use.

Open Command Center →
💙

HeadyAI-IDE

VS Code and JetBrains extensions that bring AI-powered code generation, real-time suggestions, and architecture analysis directly into your editor.

Install Extension →
⚡

HeadyAPI

Interactive API playground. Test HeadyBrain endpoints with live, editable JSON requests and beautiful response visualization. Ship integrations fast.

Open Playground →
🔍

HeadyWeb

AI-powered search engine and new-tab replacement. Every search enriched by Heady™'s knowledge base. Premium accounts with history, favorites, and Pro features.

Try HeadyWeb →
🔗

HeadyConnection

Community platform connecting Heady users. Share workflows, discover integrations, and collaborate with other builders who use AI the right way.

Join Community →
Architecture

20 Specialized AI Nodes.
One Coherent System.

Not a monolith. A living network of specialized intelligence that orchestrates itself.

Jules
The Hyper-Surgeon — precision code edits
Observer
All-Seeing Eye — system monitoring
Builder
Master Constructor — scaffolding & compilation
Atlas
Auto-Archivist — documentation & knowledge
Pythia
Sacred Oracle — multimodal generation
Conductor
Task Maestro — workflow orchestration
+ 14 more nodes
Vinci, Soul, Sims, Lens, Fast, Copilot…

Intelligence That Scales

Each node is a specialist. Together, they form a system that's greater than the sum of its parts.

✓3D vector memory with persistent recall across sessions
✓DAG-based task execution with automatic fallback routing
✓HCFP auto-success engine ensures zero-downtime operations
✓Multi-provider AI with Gemini, Claude, GPT, Groq, and local models
✓Edge-deployed via Cloudflare Workers for sub-50ms latency
✓Enterprise RBAC, audit trails, and human-approval gates

Ready to Think Differently?

Join developers who've replaced their scattered AI tools with one coherent system.

Start with HeadyBuddy → Explore the API
